bio: Graphic Designer with 2 years of experience in the industry, my work has spanned to 3D Artist, Video Editing, and Videography.
My passion is to make things better efficiently and as fast as possible with little mistakes.

items: Deputy Coordinator Documentation — Plaza Desain Emotia
Regional Head UKM — Bersama Dalam Musik Kemanggisan
BINUS University — Visual Communication Design, New Media

portfolioItems.title: ALONE
portfolioItems.description: A lonesome robot looking for signs of life on another planet after Earth met its death.

portfolioItems.title: WEALTH DON'T MATTER HERE
portfolioItems.description: An Assignment with the theme of wealth where no matter what your status is, we all live and die in the same land and dirt.

portfolioItems.title: WISH IT WASN'T OVER
portfolioItems.description: A skeleton that can't accept the reality that he still hasn't completed all his dreams.

portfolioItems.title: MY BEAUTIFUL FLOWER
portfolioItems.description: A personal project representing the beautiful side of nature, a study on Armature rig.

portfolioItems.title: SUNSHINE IN THE PALM OF MY HANDS
portfolioItems.description: An early concept on the topic of nature before deciding to make the Ineke Hans Recycleable Chair as the main topic.

portfolioItems.title: TO SEEK LIFE
portfolioItems.description: Showing how greediness and no respect ends in a fight to the death for a life that isn't entirely yours.

portfolioItems.title: PLAZA DESAIN EMOTIA TEASER TRAILER
portfolioItems.description: Teaser trailer for Plaza Desain Emotia using After Effects and Original Music made using Ableton Live Suite 10.

portfolioItems.title: RAGHSAVADA ZAVTAVADHRA FAREWELL
portfolioItems.description: A Farewell video for my High School SMA Labschool Cibubur Class, Rahgsavada Zavtavadhra.

portfolioItems.title: NIGHT NIGHT
portfolioItems.description: A personal project made for fun, study of using 24fps Film Format. Made using Vegas Pro 18.

portfolioItems.title: SUMMER FUN RIDES
portfolioItems.description: Compilation of Team Wannabe bikes made using RareVision VHS and edited using Filmora.

portfolioItems.title: JAKARTA TOWN FESTIVAL TEASER ANIMATION
portfolioItems.description: Teaser trailer for Jakarta Town Festival using Blender and After Effects.

portfolioItems.title: 007 NO TIME TO DIE OPENING TITLE REDESIGN
portfolioItems.description: Opening Title Redesign of James Bond No Time To Die, made using After Effects and Blender.

portfolioItems.title: BIRTHDAY LETTER ANIMATION
portfolioItems.description: An Animation made personally for a friend's Birthday using Blender.

portfolioItems.title: INEKE HANS RECYCLEABLE CHAIR VIDEO EXPLAINER
portfolioItems.description: A Video Explainer using Blender on recycleable chair benefits, with original music from Ableton Live Suite 10.
